title: Majnoo
overview: The film Majnoo is a Triangle Love Story of Majnoo, Preet and Mahi. Preet and Mahi fell in love with Majnoo and twists and turns come up when Mahi comes into the life of Preet and Majnoo. Who will become Majnoo's lover and partner.
